name: Middle Eastern Kebabs
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon fresh root ginger, minced or grated
1 tablespoon lemon juice, fresh or bottled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill or barbecue. Place all ingredients, except the lamb, into a bowl and mix together. Add the lamb and mix well using your hands.
2. Shape the mixture into eight sausages. Thread them onto skewers. Cook under the grill for about 10-12 minutes, turning them over occasionally. Serve with pita bread, salad and yogurt.
